title: Buckwheat Honey Cake
description: A moist buckwheat cake infused with the sweetness of honey, perfect for a dessert or snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together buckwheat flour, honey, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eastern sweet cream and unsalted butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Let the cake cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
